title: Elysium Days
description: A modpack that tries to make Minecraft fun again!
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b365006ea8fffdccbec7cfa2f98bb2ea9786f159_0.webp)
# What does this modpack offer?
- 🌎 **Overhauled Biomes** — Discover 70+ new surface biomes, along with cave biomes & cool features! - 🏕️ **Custom Structures** — Reimagined vanilla structures for the best experience! - 🧊 **More Blocks** — Build your dream house using more than 11,000 block variants! - 📷 **Photography** — Capture memories with a functioning camera and picture frames! - 🍞 **Culinary Arts** — Cook new dishes and do farming-related things! - 🎯 **Bounty Quests** — Get rewards for finishing bounty quests for the villagers! - 🎒 **Backpacks** — Don't run out of inventory slots while you're out exploring! - 🫎 **New Animals** — It looks like it’s time to build a zoo with 30+ new animals! - 🔊 **Custom Sounds** — Be surrounded by new sounds which will make everything feel so immersive! - ☠️ **Expanded Archaeology** — Dig into archaeology with new tools and items to uncover fossils! - 🌌 **Warden Dimension** — Do you wonder what is beneath the bedrock? Maybe it's time to find out. - 🌋 **Evolved Nether** — Blazing more than ever, Introduces bosses, quests, weapons, and 8 new biomes. - 🔮 **The End** — Overhauled with a harder dragon fight, 3 new biomes, and structures. And its entrance is no longer the stronghold... ~~*Hint: Trade with a cartographer villager for the map of the Lost Castle.*~~ #
If you encounter any glitches & crashes, or if you have any suggestions, you can tell me by joining [Discord](https://discord.gg/WFpDr7zY8Z) or opening an issue on [GitHub](https://github.com/Fyoncle/Elysium-Days/issues) **Before reporting, please check the [Common Issues](https://fyoncle.gitbook.io/elysium-days/guides/common-issues) wiki page, as some issues already have fixes.** # For any questions, please check the [Frequently Asked Questions](https://fyoncle.gitbook.io/elysium-days/getting-started/frequently-asked-questions) wiki.
#

#
⛔ Incompatible Mods - [More Mob Variants](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-mob-variants) → Incompatible with Let's Do Meadow - [Smooth GUI](https://modrinth.com/mod/smooth-gui) → Incompatible with Debugify - [Merchant Markers](https://modrinth.com/mod/merchant-markers) → Resource loading failed error - [Better End](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterend) & [Better Nether](https://modrinth.com/mod/betternether) → Critical rendering issues, crashes, and shader issues with epilepsy risks - [Phosphor](https://modrinth.com/mod/phosphor) → Incompatible with Starlight - [Leave My Bars Alone](https://modrinth.com/mod/leave-my-bars-alone) → Incompatible with Better Mount HUD - [SleepWarp](https://modrinth.com/mod/sleep-warp) → Causing crashes on servers - [Sounds](https://modrinth.com/mod/sound) → Causing unplayable FPS drops as of 1.0.0 version of the mod on very random situations, specifically being ocean monuments - [Let Sleeping Dogs Lie](https://modrinth.com/mod/let-sleeping-dogs-lie) → Incompatible with Fresh Animations - [cat_jam](https://modrinth.com/mod/cat_jam) → Incompatible with Fresh Animations - [FastAnim](https://modrinth.com/mod/fastanim) → Incompatible with Fresh Animations
✅ Compatible & Optional Mods
Distant Horizons
Fully Compatible!
Simple Voice Chat
Fully Compatible!
Create Fabric
Fully Compatible!
Although it's suggested to use Iris FLW Compat with it.
Essential
Essential is NOT recommended for use due to these reasons.
Fully Compatible!
Replay Mod
Fully Compatible!
Fabric Seasons
Partially Compatible (Only works on some biomes)
Physics Mod
Partially Compatible (Broken Ragdolls due to Fresh Animations)
